description_long: This object consists of three elongated, upright, and wavy-edged green leaves that radiate from a central base, resembling the foliage of a hardy succulent or xerophytic plant. The leaves are narrow, with irregular, jagged margins and a slightly undulating surface, giving them a textured and organic appearance. The coloration is a muted olive green, with no visible variegation or patterning. There is no visible pot or container, and the base of the leaves appears to converge at a single point, suggesting the plant is either freshly planted or the pot is not modeled. The overall form is sparse and vertical, with each leaf curving gently outward from the center. The asset lacks any visible soil, decorative elements, or plant label.
description: A sparse, upright plant with three wavy-edged, olive green leaves radiating from a central base, with no visible pot or decoration.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing all three jagged, upright leaves fanning out symmetrically from the center.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thinness and vertical orientation of the leaves, with only one leaf clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the three leaves with their wavy edges and central convergence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the narrow profile and upright stance of the leaves.
